TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi abstract beforefieldinit ECDiffieHellman extends System.Security.Cryptography.ECAlgorithm
Public MustInherit Class ECDiffieHellman Inherits ECAlgorithm

Docs.summary: Provides an abstract base class that Elliptic Curve Diffie-Hellman (ECDH) algorithm implementations can derive from. This class provides the basic set of operations that all ECDH implementations must support.

remarks.format: ## Remarks This class serves as the abstract base class for ECDH implementations.

MemberSignature.Value: protected ECDiffieHellman ();
.method familyhidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor() cil managed
Protected Sub New ()
protected: ECDiffieHellman();

Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

remarks.format: ## Remarks This constructor is called by classes that derive from the <xref:System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellman> class. The <xref:System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellmanCng> class is the only implementation that is currently included in .NET. For information about how to create a new implementation of the Elliptic Curve Diffie-Hellman (ECDH) algorithm, see the <xref:System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellman.Create*> method.

Docs.summary: Creates a new instance of an implementation of the Elliptic Curve Diffie-Hellman (ECDH) algorithm.

MemberSignature.Value: public static System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellman Create ();
.method public static hidebysig class System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellman Create() cil managed
Public Shared Function Create () As ECDiffieHellman
static member Create : unit -> System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellman
public: static System::Security::Cryptography::ECDiffieHellman ^ Create();

Docs.summary: Creates a new instance of the default implementation of the Elliptic Curve Diffie-Hellman (ECDH) algorithm.
Docs.returns: A new instance of the default implementation of this class.

MemberSignature.Value: public static System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellman Create (System.Security.Cryptography.ECCurve curve);
.method public static hidebysig class System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellman Create(valuetype System.Security.Cryptography.ECCurve curve) cil managed
Public Shared Function Create (curve As ECCurve) As ECDiffieHellman
static member Create : System.Security.Cryptography.ECCurve -> System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellman
public: static System::Security::Cryptography::ECDiffieHellman ^ Create(System::Security::Cryptography::ECCurve curve);

Docs.param: The curve to use to generate a new public/private key-pair.
Docs.summary: Creates a new instance of the default implementation of the Elliptic Curve Diffie-Hellman (ECDH) algorithm with a new public/private key-pair generated over the specified curve.
Docs.returns: A new instance of the default implementation of the Elliptic Curve Diffie-Hellman (ECDH) algorithm.

remarks.format:
## Remarks curve must validate (that is, it must return true when passed to the <xref:System.Security.Cryptography.ECCurve.Validate*?displayProperty=nameWithType> method.
Characteristic-2 curves are not supported on Windows.

Docs.exception: does not validate.

MemberSignature.Value: public static System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellman Create (System.Security.Cryptography.ECParameters parameters);
.method public static hidebysig class System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellman Create(valuetype System.Security.Cryptography.ECParameters parameters) cil managed
Public Shared Function Create (parameters As ECParameters) As ECDiffieHellman
static member Create : System.Security.Cryptography.ECParameters -> System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellman
public: static System::Security::Cryptography::ECDiffieHellman ^ Create(System::Security::Cryptography::ECParameters parameters);

Docs.param: The parameters for the elliptic curve cryptography (ECC) algorithm.
Docs.summary: Creates a new instance of the default implementation of the Elliptic Curve Diffie-Hellman (ECDH) algorithm with the key described by the specified object.
Docs.returns: A new instance of the default implementation of the Elliptic Curve Diffie-Hellman (ECDH) algorithm.

remarks.format:
## Remarks `parameters` must validate (that is, it must return `true`) when passed to the <xref:System.Security.Cryptography.ECParameters.Validate*?displayProperty=nameWithType> method. Parameters over implicit curves are not supported.
Characteristic-2 curves are not supported on Windows.

Docs.exception: does not validate.

Attribute.AttributeName: [System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.RequiresUnreferencedCode("The default algorithm implementations might be removed, use strong type references like 'RSA.Create()' instead.")]
[<System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.RequiresUnreferencedCode("The default algorithm implementations might be removed, use strong type references like 'RSA.Create()' instead.")>]

[System.Obsolete("Cryptographic factory methods accepting an algorithm name are obsolete. Use the parameterless Create factory method on the algorithm type instead.", DiagnosticId="SYSLIB0045", UrlFormat="https://aka.ms/dotnet-warnings/{0}")]

Docs.param: The name of an implementation of the ECDH algorithm.
Docs.summary: Creates a new instance of the specified implementation of the Elliptic Curve Diffie-Hellman (ECDH) algorithm.
Docs.returns: A new instance of the specified implementation of this class. If the specified algorithm name does not map to an ECDH implementation, this method returns .
Docs.exception: The parameter is .

Docs.summary: Performs key derivation using a specified hash algorithm.

MemberSignature.Value: public byte[] DeriveKeyFromHash (System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey otherPartyPublicKey, System.Security.Cryptography.HashAlgorithmName hashAlgorithm);

.method public hidebysig instance unsigned int8[] DeriveKeyFromHash(class System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey otherPartyPublicKey, valuetype System.Security.Cryptography.HashAlgorithmName hashAlgorithm) cil managed
Public Function DeriveKeyFromHash (otherPartyPublicKey As ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey, hashAlgorithm As HashAlgorithmName) As Byte()
member this.DeriveKeyFromHash : System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey * System.Security.Cryptography.HashAlgorithmName -> byte[]
public: cli::array <System::Byte> ^ DeriveKeyFromHash(System::Security::Cryptography::ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey ^ otherPartyPublicKey, System::Security::Cryptography::HashAlgorithmName hashAlgorithm);

Docs.param: The other party's public key.
The hash algorithm to use to derive the key material.
Docs.summary: Performs key derivation using a specified hash algorithm.
Docs.returns: The hash of the shared secret.

remarks.format: ## Remarks This overload calls the <xref:System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellman.DeriveKeyFromHash*> method passing `null` as the prepend and append values.

Docs.exception:
The curve used by has a different size than the curve from this key.
-or-
The parameter does not specify a hash.
is .

The curve used by is different than the curve from this key.
-or-
This instance represents only a public key.

MemberSignature.Value: public virtual byte[] DeriveKeyFromHash (System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey otherPartyPublicKey, System.Security.Cryptography.HashAlgorithmName hashAlgorithm, byte[]? secretPrepend, byte[]? secretAppend);

.method public hidebysig newslot virtual instance unsigned int8[] DeriveKeyFromHash(class System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey otherPartyPublicKey, valuetype System.Security.Cryptography.HashAlgorithmName hashAlgorithm, unsigned int8[] secretPrepend, unsigned int8[] secretAppend) cil managed
Public Overridable Function DeriveKeyFromHash (otherPartyPublicKey As ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey, hashAlgorithm As HashAlgorithmName, secretPrepend As Byte(), secretAppend As Byte()) As Byte()

abstract member DeriveKeyFromHash : System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey * System.Security.Cryptography.HashAlgorithmName * byte[] * byte[] -> byte[] override this.DeriveKeyFromHash : System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey * System.Security.Cryptography.HashAlgorithmName * byte[] * byte[] -> byte[]

public: virtual cli::array <System::Byte> ^ DeriveKeyFromHash(System::Security::Cryptography::ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey ^ otherPartyPublicKey, System::Security::Cryptography::HashAlgorithmName hashAlgorithm, cli::array <System::Byte> ^ secretPrepend, cli::array <System::Byte> ^ secretAppend);

Docs.param: The other party's public key.
The hash algorithm to use to derive the key material.
A value to prepend to the derived secret before hashing.
A value to append to the derived secret before hashing.
Docs.summary: When implemented in a derived class, performs key derivation using a specified hash algorithm with optional prepended or appended data.
Docs.returns: The hash of the shared secret after prepending or appending data as requested.

remarks.format:
## Remarks
This method internally performs the Elliptic Curve Diffie-Hellman key agreement to produce the shared secret (`z`). The return value from this method is the result of `HASH(secretPrepend || z || secretAppend)` using the specified hash algorithm, where `||` signifies concatenation.
If the value of `secretPrepend` or `secretAppend` is `null`, they are treated as empty arrays.

Docs.exception: A derived class must override this method.

The curve used by has a different size than the curve from this key.
-or-
The parameter does not specify a hash.
is .

The curve used by is different than the curve from this key.
-or-
This instance represents only a public key.

Docs.summary: Performs key derivation using a specified HMAC (Hash-based Message Authentication Code) algorithm.

The hash algorithm to use to derive the key material.
The key for the HMAC.
Docs.summary: Performs key derivation using a specified HMAC (Hash-based Message Authentication Code) algorithm.
Docs.returns: The HMAC of the shared secret.

-or-

MemberSignature.Value: public virtual byte[] DeriveKeyFromHmac (System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey otherPartyPublicKey, System.Security.Cryptography.HashAlgorithmName hashAlgorithm, byte[]? hmacKey, byte[]? secretPrepend, byte[]? secretAppend);

.method public hidebysig newslot virtual instance unsigned int8[] DeriveKeyFromHmac(class System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey otherPartyPublicKey, valuetype System.Security.Cryptography.HashAlgorithmName hashAlgorithm, unsigned int8[] hmacKey, unsigned int8[] secretPrepend, unsigned int8[] secretAppend) cil managed

Public Overridable Function DeriveKeyFromHmac (otherPartyPublicKey As ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey, hashAlgorithm As HashAlgorithmName, hmacKey As Byte(), secretPrepend As Byte(), secretAppend As Byte()) As Byte()

abstract member DeriveKeyFromHmac : System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey * System.Security.Cryptography.HashAlgorithmName * byte[] * byte[] * byte[] -> byte[] override this.DeriveKeyFromHmac : System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey * System.Security.Cryptography.HashAlgorithmName * byte[] * byte[] * byte[] -> byte[]

public: virtual cli::array <System::Byte> ^ DeriveKeyFromHmac(System::Security::Cryptography::ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey ^ otherPartyPublicKey, System::Security::Cryptography::HashAlgorithmName hashAlgorithm, cli::array <System::Byte> ^ hmacKey, cli::array <System::Byte> ^ secretPrepend, cli::array <System::Byte> ^ secretAppend);

Docs.param: The other party's public key.
The hash algorithm to use to derive the key material.
The key for the HMAC.
A value to prepend to the derived secret before hashing.
A value to append to the derived secret before hashing.
Docs.summary: When implemented in a derived class, performs key derivation using a specified HMAC (Hash-based Message Authentication Code) algorithm with optional prepended or appended data.
Docs.returns: The HMAC of the shared secret after prepending or appending data as requested.

remarks.format:
## Remarks
This method internally performs the Elliptic Curve Diffie-Hellman key agreement to produce the shared secret (`z`).
When `hmacKey` is `null`, the return value from this method is the result of `HMAC-HASH(z, secretPrepend || z || secretAppend)` using the specified HMAC algorithm, where `||` signifies concatenation. Otherwise, the return value from this method is the result of `HMAC-HASH(hmacKey, secretPrepend || z || secretAppend)`.
If the value of `secretPrepend` or `secretAppend` is `null`, they are treated as empty arrays.

Docs.exception: A derived class must override this method.

The curve used by has a different size than the curve from this key.
-or-
The parameter does not specify a hash.
is .

The curve used by is different than the curve from this key.
-or-
This instance represents only a public key.

MemberSignature.Value: public virtual byte[] DeriveKeyMaterial (System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey otherPartyPublicKey);
.method public hidebysig newslot virtual instance unsigned int8[] DeriveKeyMaterial(class System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey otherPartyPublicKey) cil managed
Public Overridable Function DeriveKeyMaterial (otherPartyPublicKey As ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey) As Byte()
abstract member DeriveKeyMaterial : System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey -> byte[] override this.DeriveKeyMaterial : System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey -> byte[]
public: virtual cli::array <System::Byte> ^ DeriveKeyMaterial(System::Security::Cryptography::ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey ^ otherPartyPublicKey);

Docs.param: The other party's public key.
Docs.summary: When implemented in a derived class, performs a key derivation on the shared secret.
Docs.returns: The result of the key derivation function, using the shared secret as an input.

remarks.format:
## Remarks
The default behavior of this method is equivalent to calling <xref:System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellman.DeriveKeyFromHash*> specifying SHA-256 as the hash algorithm with no prepend or append values. Some implementations allow the behavior of this method to be changed, and callers are advised to call whichever method explicitly says it performs the key derivation they need.

Docs.exception: The curve used by has a different size than the curve from this key.
is .

The curve used by is different than the curve from this key.
-or-
This instance represents only a public key.

MemberSignature.Value: public virtual byte[] DeriveKeyTls (System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey otherPartyPublicKey, byte[] prfLabel, byte[] prfSeed);

.method public hidebysig newslot virtual instance unsigned int8[] DeriveKeyTls(class System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey otherPartyPublicKey, unsigned int8[] prfLabel, unsigned int8[] prfSeed) cil managed
Public Overridable Function DeriveKeyTls (otherPartyPublicKey As ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey, prfLabel As Byte(), prfSeed As Byte()) As Byte()

abstract member DeriveKeyTls : System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey * byte[] * byte[] -> byte[] override this.DeriveKeyTls : System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey * byte[] * byte[] -> byte[]

public: virtual cli::array <System::Byte> ^ DeriveKeyTls(System::Security::Cryptography::ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey ^ otherPartyPublicKey, cli::array <System::Byte> ^ prfLabel, cli::array <System::Byte> ^ prfSeed);

Docs.param: The other party's public key.
The ASCII-encoded PRF label.
The 64-byte PRF seed.
Docs.summary: When implemented in a derived class, performs key derivation using the TLS (Transport Layer Security) 1.1 PRF (Pseudo-Random Function).
Docs.returns: The first 48 bytes from the TLS 1.1 PRF, using the shared secret as the key.

remarks.format:
## Remarks
This method internally performs the Elliptic Curve Diffie-Hellman key agreement to produce the shared secret (`z`).
The return value of this method is a 48 byte output of the TLS 1.1 PRF (Pseudo-Random Function), `PRF(z, prfLabel, prfSeed)`.
For more information, see [IETF RFC 4346, section 5](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc4346#section-5).

Docs.exception: A derived class must override this method.
The curve used by has a different size than the curve from this key.
, or is .

is not exactly 64 bytes in length.
-or-
The curve used by is different than the curve from this key.
-or-
This instance represents only a public key.

MemberSignature.Value: public virtual byte[] DeriveRawSecretAgreement (System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey otherPartyPublicKey);
.method public hidebysig newslot virtual instance unsigned int8[] DeriveRawSecretAgreement(class System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey otherPartyPublicKey) cil managed
Public Overridable Function DeriveRawSecretAgreement (otherPartyPublicKey As ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey) As Byte()

abstract member DeriveRawSecretAgreement : System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey -> byte[] override this.DeriveRawSecretAgreement : System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey -> byte[]
public: virtual cli::array <System::Byte> ^ DeriveRawSecretAgreement(System::Security::Cryptography::ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey ^ otherPartyPublicKey);

Docs.param: The public key of the party with which to derive a mutual secret.
Docs.summary: Derive raw key material.
Docs.remarks: Care must be taking when using the raw derived secret agreement value. The raw value is expected to be used as input in to a Key Derivation Function, and not used directly as key material.
Docs.exception: is .
is over a different curve than this key.
A derived implementation has not provided an implementation of the method.
The current platform does not support raw key agreement.
The object has already been disposed.

Public Overrides Sub FromXmlString (xmlString As String)
override this.FromXmlString : string -> unit
public: override void FromXmlString(System::String ^ xmlString);

Docs.param: The XML string to use to reconstruct the object.
Docs.summary: This method throws in all cases.
Docs.exception: In all cases.

Docs.summary: Imports the public/private keypair from a PKCS#8 EncryptedPrivateKeyInfo structure after decrypting with a byte-based password, replacing the keys for this object.
Imports an encrypted RFC 7468 PEM-encoded private key, replacing the keys for this object.

MemberSignature.Value: public override string KeyExchangeAlgorithm { get; }
.property instance string KeyExchangeAlgorithm
Public Overrides ReadOnly Property KeyExchangeAlgorithm As String
member this.KeyExchangeAlgorithm : string
public: virtual property System::String ^ KeyExchangeAlgorithm { System::String ^ get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets the name of the key exchange algorithm.
Docs.value: The name of the key exchange algorithm.

remarks.format:
## Remarks The default (non-overridden) implementation of this property returns the string "ECDiffieHellman".
This property is inherited from the <xref:System.Security.Cryptography.AsymmetricAlgorithm> base class.

MemberSignature.Value: public abstract System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey PublicKey { get; }
.property instance class System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey PublicKey
Public MustOverride ReadOnly Property PublicKey As ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey
member this.PublicKey : System.Security.Cryptography.ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey
public: abstract property System::Security::Cryptography::ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey ^ PublicKey { System::Security::Cryptography::ECDiffieHellmanPublicKey ^ get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets the public key that is being used by the current Elliptic Curve Diffie-Hellman (ECDH) instance.
Docs.value: The public part of the ECDH key pair that is being used by this instance.

MemberSignature.Value: public override string? SignatureAlgorithm { get; }
.property instance string SignatureAlgorithm
Public Overrides ReadOnly Property SignatureAlgorithm As String
member this.SignatureAlgorithm : string
public: virtual property System::String ^ SignatureAlgorithm { System::String ^ get(); };

Docs.summary: Gets the name of the signature algorithm.

remarks.format:
## Remarks This property is inherited from the <xref:System.Security.Cryptography.AsymmetricAlgorithm> base class.
The Elliptic Curve Diffie-Hellman (ECDH) algorithm is used for key derivation, not digital signature generation. Therefore, this property returns `null`.

MemberSignature.Value: public override string ToXmlString (bool includePrivateParameters);

Public Overrides Function ToXmlString (includePrivateParameters As Boolean) As String
override this.ToXmlString : bool -> string
public: override System::String ^ ToXmlString(bool includePrivateParameters);

Docs.param: to include private parameters; otherwise, .
Docs.summary: This method throws in all cases.
Docs.returns: This method doesn't return a value.
Docs.exception: In all cases.

Docs.summary: Attempts to export the current key in the PKCS#8 EncryptedPrivateKeyInfo format into a provided buffer, using a byte-based password.
